regions.text: The earth seems to be getting smaller because men’s experience is getting wider. New ways of living have come in the last fifty years.
Stranger things are coming. Men can today travel through space to the moon.
What is Space? It is hard to say what Space and Time are. We and the sun and the moon are all in Space and Time.
But no one understands what Space and Time are. Not even the best philosophers are clear about them.
